title: Diplectria biligulata
taxonomy: Diplectria biligulata is a type of lichenized fungus within the family Graphidaceae. The family Graphidaceae is part of the larger order Ostropales in the class Lecanoromycetes. The class Lecanoromycetes is a group of fungi in the division Ascomycota. The division Ascomycota is a major group of fungi that includes many species of fungi with a wide range of characteristics. Diplectria biligulata's classification is further detailed with its kingdom being Fungi.
